text: For the drainage field test package we recommend Subcontractor GI-2 (illustrative) (F-GI-02) at HK$1,114,790 — the lowest fully-priced bid once every return is leveled to the same scope. On the bid sheet Subcontractor GI-1 (illustrative) (F-GI-01) looked cheapest at HK$1,020,590, but it excluded the water supply (G14) and did not price the freeboard (G16); valued at the peer rate for those two items its like-for-like total is HK$1,127,890, above the recommended bid. Subcontractor GI-3 (illustrative) (F-GI-03) corrected upward from HK$1,067,150 to HK$1,133,150 once an understated line (G13, set up and carry out) was recomputed against qty x rate. This package is awarded on a leveled-price basis; the public-record risk screen is not applied here, as the discovery database currently holds building contractors rather than ground-investigation specialists.
